commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Maintainers need to decide whether to rebase/adopt this focused conflicting branch or open a narrow replacement after the contributor adds inspectable Synology proof.; Needs attention: The diff has no supply-chain concern, but the tokenless HEAD liveness response is a concrete webhook security-boundary choice that should be accepted deliberately. (sha=ed540ea7235e87235b30586fc5497d1815ea5ddb)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Synology Chat webhook handler to return 200 for HEAD probes and 200 JSON success ACKs for accepted POSTs, with updated tests.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +14. Total +26 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main rejects HEAD through the non-POST 405 branch and returns 204/no body for accepted POSTs; I did not run a live Synology NAS reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to decide whether to rebase/adopt this focused conflicting branch or open a narrow replacement after the contributor adds inspectable Synology proof.
